FolderName.Name: Macro Folder
FolderName.Hint: Name of the Macro folder to show in the wheel. Leave blank to use the current hotbar page.

MiddleClick.Name: Open on Middle-Click
MiddleClick.Hint: Middle-click the canvas to open the wheel at the cursor.

Radius.Name: Ring Radius
Radius.Hint: Distance in pixels from the center to each button.

ButtonSize.Name: Icon Size
ButtonSize.Hint: Diameter of each wheel button in pixels.

SpreadEvenly.Name: Spread Icons Evenly
SpreadEvenly.Hint: On: space icons evenly around each ring. Off: pack them next to each other, counter-clockwise from the top.

ButtonShape.Name: Button Shape
ButtonShape.Hint: Shape used for all wheel buttons and their images.

OpenWheel.Name: Open Radial Macros
OpenWheel.Hint: Toggle the macro wheel at the cursor. No key is bound by default.

FolderIcon.Label: Wheel Icon
FolderIcon.Hint: Image shown for this folder's button in the radial macro wheel.

RADIALMACROS.FolderNotFound: Radial Macros: no Macro folder named "{name}" was found.
